data.title: GREEN: Create check-portability.sh lint script
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh that scans files for hardcoded home-directory paths (/Users/<name>/ and /home/<name>/) and supports # portability-ok inline suppression.

### Script behavior:
- Accept file paths as arguments (one or more files to check)
- Grep each file for patterns matching /Users/<username>/ and /home/<username>/
- Skip lines containing # portability-ok comment (inline suppression)
- The script's own regex lines must have # portability-ok to avoid self-flagging
- Exit 0 if no violations found, exit 1 if violations found
- Print file:line for each violation to stderr

### Regex patterns:
- /Users/[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9._-]*/  (macOS home dirs)
- /home/[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9._-]*/   (Linux home dirs)
- Exclude /Users/Shared/, /usr/, /etc/, and other system paths
- The pattern in the script source must have # portability-ok to avoid self-matching

### Important: make script executable (chmod +x)

Remove .test-index RED markers from Task 1.

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh (create)
- .test-index (modify: remove RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] check-portability.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh
- [ ] Script detects macOS hardcoded paths
  Verify: echo '/Users/testuser/foo' > /tmp/test-port.txt && ! plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh /tmp/test-port.txt
- [ ] Script detects Linux hardcoded paths
  Verify: echo '/home/testuser/foo' > /tmp/test-port.txt && ! plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh /tmp/test-port.txt
- [ ] Script passes clean files
  Verify: echo 'clean line' > /tmp/test-port.txt && plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh /tmp/test-port.txt
- [ ] Script respects portability-ok suppression
  Verify: echo '/Users/testuser/foo # portability-ok' > /tmp/test-port.txt && plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh /tmp/test-port.txt
- [ ] .test-index RED markers removed
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_detects_macos_hardcoded_path\]' .test-index
- [ ] All portability tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-check-portability.sh
